evidences.content: 好了，现在让我们来看看合成，我们将使用 NukeX 非商业软件来进行合成。 Alright, now let's take a look at compositing and we're gonna take a look at this by using NukeX non-commercial 现在任何人都可以免费下载。这里的所有原理在 After Effects 中都是一样的 Which anyone can download for free right now.
